payload.message:
Run AWS health check (lean mode).

Use log/task deltas only (do not re-read multi-day memory unless post-compaction or anomaly).
If no Critical/High issue requiring Bayani action now, output exactly NO_REPLY.
If alerting, output max 4 bullets: issue, urgency, required action, deadline/window.
Always log details to memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md.

Run geopolitical monitoring (lean mode).

Assess only significant new events + downstream effects.
If no Critical/High event requiring Bayani action now, output exactly NO_REPLY.
If alerting, output max 6 bullets: event, urgency, downstream effects, time windows, probability/confidence, required action/window.
Log full analysis to memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md.

Run AWS coordination check (lean mode).

Use queue/log/session deltas only (no routine 2-day memory sweep).
If no Critical/High issue requiring Bayani action now, output exactly NO_REPLY.
If alerting, output max 4 bullets: issue, urgency, required action, deadline/window.
Log details to memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md.
